LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KYLE HEINZ'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED IN PART. ALL PARTS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ARE APPROVED IN THEIR ENTIRELY EXCEPT THE PROVISIONS REGARDING ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. THE ATTORNEYS' FEES ARE REDUCED TO $127,500 WHICH REFLECTS A MULTIPLIER OF 1.5. THAT MULTIPLIER IS APPROPRIATE GIVEN THE CONTINGENT RISK AND THE RESULTS ACHIEVED. ALL CLAIMED COSTS OF $9,792 ARE AWARDED. THE TOTAL OF FEES AND COSTS IS $137,292. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jared Hague, Esq., from Sutton Harmaker, 559-449-1888, for plaintiff and moving party
Joshua D. Kienitz, Esq., from Litter Mendelson, P.C., 415-399-8451, for defendant PG&E
Ayse Kuzucuoglu, Esq., from Drinker Biddle & Reath, LLP, 415-591-7598, for defndants Zempleo, Inc. and Amerit consulting, Inc.

The parties submitted to the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF KYLE HEINZ'S Notice Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted in part. All parts of the settlement agreement are approved in their entirely except the provisions regarding attorney's fees and costs. The attorneys' fees are reduced to $127,500 which reflects a multiplier of 1.5. That multiplier is appropriate given the contingent risk and the results achieved. All claimed costs of $9,792 are awarded. The total of fees and costs is $137,292. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; not reported. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement ; Declarations Of Kyle Heinz And S. Brett Sutton And Appendix Of Federal Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jared Hague, Esq., of Sutton Hatmaker Law Corporation, Tel. 559.449.1888, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Joshua D. Kienitz, Esq., of Littler Mendelson, Tel. 415.399.8451, appearing for Defendant and opposing party PG&E.
Robert G. Hulteng, Esq., of Littler Mendelson, Tel. 415.288.6395, appearing for Defendant and opposing party PG&E.
Heather M. Sager, Esq., of Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP, Tel. 415.591.7500, appearing for Defendants and opposing party Amerit Inc. & Zempleao Inc.

RULING: After hearing, PLAINTIFF KYLE HEINZ' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. The date for Final Approval Hearing is May 21, 2012. Mr. Hague is to give notice and submit a new proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
